commits.author: Ghassen Lahmar
lines: Use the atmosphere ambient LUT for the vessel diffuse ambient instead of using a single sample of the sky LUT, reduces reflective/metallic look on matte parts in the absence of a pre-filtered environment reflection method

commits.author: Ghassen Lahmar
lines: Use a better Jupiter texture, in preparation for Jupiter volumetrics

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Initial porting of external biome tool to KSA.
Lowered the curvature of Earth's erosion.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed white-screen graphical error caused by rare div-by-zero in the procedural modifiers code.
Added GradientStrength parameter to procedural modifiers for artificially scaling the terrain gradient.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Added the Max filter stage to the biome map exporter.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Removed the old sand dunes from Mars and replaced them with the newer version.
